slots.where_and_how: Cross-check Jane Doe against a second public source (official bio, employer site, verified profile) — name-collision risk if only one match.
Look on LinkedIn (/in/jdoe); cross-check via company press release, filings, or official site.
Search Jane Doe across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, GitHub, personal site — surface ≥2 distinct profiles.
Look at Jane Doe's personal site, GitHub profile bio, conference speaker page, or company contact directory.
Walk LinkedIn (/in/jdoe) experience section; cross-check at least one prior position via press release, GitHub org membership, or conference bio.
Check LinkedIn location field; corroborate via Twitter/X bio, conference attendance, or geotagged content.
Pull profile picture from LinkedIn (/in/jdoe), conference speaker page, company team page, or news photo.
